assertions.name: strong-conclusion-high-confidence
assertions.description: Well-evidenced database pooling conclusion should get HIGH CONFIDENCE

assertions.name: strong-conclusion-score-range
assertions.description: Strong conclusion should score 7.5+ consensus confidence

assertions.name: weak-conclusion-low-confidence
assertions.description: Poorly-evidenced microservices rewrite should get LOW CONFIDENCE or NO CONSENSUS

assertions.name: weak-conclusion-score-range
assertions.description: Weak conclusion should score below 5.5 consensus confidence

assertions.name: weak-conclusion-counter-arguments
assertions.rubric: Does the report identify at least one 'strong' counter-argument to the microservices rewrite? YES or NO.
assertions.description: Weak conclusion should have strong counter-arguments identified

assertions.name: gray-area-moderate-confidence
assertions.description: GraphQL vs REST with mixed evidence should get MODERATE CONFIDENCE

assertions.name: gray-area-score-range
assertions.description: Gray area conclusion should score between 5.0 and 8.0

assertions.name: all-fixtures-have-3-validators
assertions.description: Every consensus report must include exactly 3 validator verdicts

assertions.name: all-fixtures-have-recommendation
assertions.description: Every consensus report must end with a recommendation section

assertions.name: cross-fixture-ranking
assertions.description: Strong conclusion must score higher than gray area, which must score higher than weak
